errors.notAllowedSystem: Screen sharing was cancelled or denied. Please try again and select a screen, window, or tab to share.
errors.notAllowedMic: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.
errors.notFoundSystem: No screen or window was available to share. Please make sure a display is connected and try again.
errors.notFoundMic: No microphone was found. Please connect a microphone and try again.
errors.notSupportedSystem: Your browser does not support audio capture via screen sharing. Please try Chrome, Edge, or Opera.
errors.notSupportedMic: Your browser does not support microphone access. Please try a modern browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.
errors.notReadableSystem: Could not access the screen. Another application may be preventing screen capture.
errors.notReadableMic: Your microphone could not be accessed. It may be in use by another application. Try closing it and trying again.
errors.abortError: The request was cancelled. Please try again when you are ready.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong: {{message}}. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.noAudioBase: No audio was included in the screen share. Please try again and make sure to check "Share audio" (or "Share system audio") in the browser dialog.
errors.noAudioNonChromium: {{browser}} does not support audio capture via screen sharing. Please try Chrome, Edge, or Opera.
errors.noAudioWindowsChromeOS: All sharing modes (screen, window, and tab) support audio on {{os}}.
errors.noAudioMacOS: On macOS 14.2+, screen and window sharing support audio in Chrome. Older macOS versions are limited to tab sharing.
errors.noAudioLinux: On Linux, only tab sharing supports audio.
errors.noAudioUnknown: On Windows and ChromeOS, all sharing modes support audio. On macOS 14.2+, screen and window sharing support audio in Chrome. On Linux, only tab sharing supports audio.
errors.webgl2NotSupportedDesc: MangoWave requires WebGL 2 to render visualizations. Please try a modern browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.
errors.webglContextLostDesc: Your device's graphics system was interrupted. This can happen when your device is under heavy load, the GPU is shared with other applications, or the display configuration changed. Reloading the page will restore the visualizer.
errors.renderingError: A rendering error occurred, possibly a WebGL or Web Audio issue.
errors.playbackDecodeError: Could not play "{{filename}}". This format may not be supported by your browser.
errors.playbackBlocked: Playback was blocked by your browser. Try tapping the play button in the control panel.
errors.fullscreenNotSupported: Unfortunately, your device doesn't support fullscreen from the browser.

fileValidation.singleRejected: "{{filename}}" is not a supported audio file. Supported formats: MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, AAC, Opus, and M4A.
fileValidation.multipleRejected: {{count}} files were not supported audio formats and were skipped: {{names}}. Supported formats: MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, AAC, Opus, and M4A.

settingsImport.newerVersion: Settings file is from a newer app version. Some settings may not apply
settingsImport.importedWithWarnings: Settings imported. Some settings could not be applied due to app changes

spotify.connectionFailed: Spotify connection failed. Please try again. If the issue persists, check that your account has been added to the app's authorized users.
spotify.premiumRequired: Spotify Premium is required for playback controls. You can still see now-playing info and use MangoWave with other audio sources.
spotify.networkError: Could not reach Spotify. Please check your connection and try again.
spotify.popupBlocked: Could not open the Spotify login window. Please check that pop-ups are allowed for this site and try again.

toasts.silenceDetected: No audio detected. Make sure audio is playing in the shared screen, window, or tab, and that you checked "Share audio" in the browser dialog.
toasts.silenceDetectedMic: No audio detected from your microphone. Make sure your mic is not muted and is picking up sound.
toasts.silenceDetectedLocal: No audio detected. Make sure the file is a supported format and your device volume is up.
toasts.noPresetsAvailable: No presets available. Check that at least one pack is enabled and not all presets are blocked.

playback.seekSpotifyNote: Seek updates may take a moment to sync with Spotify

presetBrowser.packsHint: Selected packs set the pool for autopilot and next preset
presetBrowser.excludedDescription: These presets are excluded from the pool. Tap any to load at your own risk.

importedPresets.description: Add community MilkDrop presets (.milk) and the textures they reference. MilkDrop was designed as a native desktop application — some presets may not render perfectly in the browser due to differences in shader translation.
importedPresets.emptyState: No imported presets. Use "Import .milk" to add community MilkDrop presets.
importedPresets.missingTextures: Missing textures (will render as noise until uploaded): {{textures}}
importedPresets.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? The .milk file will need to be re-imported.
importedPresets.clearAllConfirm: Delete all {{count}} imported presets? The .milk files will need to be re-imported.
importedPresets.idbUnavailable: Imported presets require storage access, which is unavailable in private browsing mode.

importedTextures.invalidFileType: Not a supported image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP)
importedTextures.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? The image file will need to be re-imported. Already-loaded presets will keep using it until the page is reloaded.
importedTextures.clearAllConfirm: Delete all {{count}} imported textures? The image files will need to be re-imported.
importedTextures.gpuNote: Textures loaded on the GPU persist until the page is reloaded.
importedTextures.idbUnavailable: Imported textures require storage access, which is unavailable in private browsing mode.
importedTextures.emptyStateTextures: No imported textures. Use "Import Textures" to add custom texture images.

customPacks.description: Build custom collections from any presets — bundled or imported.
customPacks.emptyState: No custom packs yet. Create one to build your own preset collections.
customPacks.allPresetsAdded: All presets have been added to this pack
customPacks.settingsFileNotPack: This is a settings file — use Settings › Data to import custom packs
customPacks.packImportedPartial: Pack "{{name}}" imported with {{count}} presets ({{skipped}} not found and skipped)
customPacks.packOverridesFilters: Autopilot and next preset use the active pack. Filters only affect this list.
customPacks.favoritesAutoSwitch: Switched from favorites to all mode

importModal.descriptionPresets:
Add community MilkDrop presets (.milk files).
MilkDrop presets were designed for a native Windows application. MangoWave translates them to run in the browser, but some presets may not render correctly due to differences in how shaders are processed. Complex presets are more likely to have visual differences.
Some presets require custom textures — you'll be notified of any missing textures after import.
importModal.descriptionTextures:
Upload texture images (JPEG, PNG, or WebP) used by imported presets.
Presets reference textures by name — for example, a preset using sampler_fire needs a texture named "fire".
importModal.storageNotePresets: Presets are stored in your browser. Clearing site data will remove them, so keep your original .milk files.
importModal.storageNoteTextures: Textures are stored in your browser. Clearing site data will remove them, so keep your original image files.
importModal.dropZonePresets: Drop .milk files here or click to browse
importModal.dropZoneTextures: Drop image files here or click to browse
importModal.missingTexturesHint: Presets with missing textures will render with visual noise where the texture should appear. Upload the matching image files to fix this.
importModal.dropTexturesHere: Drop texture images here or browse (JPEG, PNG, WebP)
importModal.idbUnavailable: Storage access is unavailable in private browsing mode.
